name: Phoenix Force Rift
text: Give to the Emma Frost player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Emma Frost and discard 1 card from your hand → remove this card from the game. • Discard 2 cards you control from play. If no cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

flavor: The Hellfire Club's attack on the Institute has devastated the building and injured many of the students.
name: Attack On The School
text: When Revealed: Each player exhausts 1 ally or support they control. Find a copy of the Hellfire Pawn minion and reveal it. If X-Mansion is in play, discard it.

name: Sebastian Shaw
text: Toughness. Villainous. Sebastian Shaw cannot attack other enemies. Forced Interrupt: When Sebastian Shaw would take damage, reduce the amount of damage he takes by 1 and give him a facedown boost card. (White Queen's nemesis minion.)

flavor: "Fais ce que tu voudras." (Do what thou wilt) –Hellfire Club Motto
name: Hellfire Pawn
text: Guard. Patrol. Incite 1. (White Queen's nemesis minion.)

flavor: “Here's to the future, my friends. The Hellfire Club is dead. Long live the Hellfire Club.”
name: Hellfire Assault
text: When Revealed: The players as a group take indirect damage equal to 1 [per_hero] more than the total number of [[Psionic]] and [[Hellfire]] cards in play.
